inputs.label: Spring Angle
inputs.businessContext: Typical spring angle of crown molding (angle between molding and wall)

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical spring angle of crown molding (angle between molding and wall)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kornişin tipik yay açısı (molding ile duvar arasındaki açı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Typischer Schrägenwinkel von Zierleisten (Winkel zwischen Leiste und Wand)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de ressort typique d'une moulure de couronne (angle entre la moulure et le mur)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de resorte típico de la moldura de corona (ángulo entre la moldura y la pared)

inputs.label: Corner Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the corner (e.g., 90° for standard inside/outside corner)

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of the corner (e.g., 90° for standard inside/outside corner)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köşenin açısı (örneğin, standart iç/dış köşe için 90°)
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel der Ecke (z. B. 90° für Standard-Innen-/Außenecke)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle du coin (par exemple, 90° pour un coin intérieur/extérieur standard)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de la esquina (ej. 90° para esquina interior/exterior estándar)

inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of one wall to be fitted with molding

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of one wall to be fitted with molding
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'un mur à équiper de moulure
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de una pared a la que se instalará la moldura

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional material percentage for waste and cutting errors

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional material percentage for waste and cutting errors
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık ve kesim hataları için ek malzeme yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Materialprozentsatz für Verschnitt und Schnittfehler
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matériau supplémentaire pour les déchets et les erreurs de coupe
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional de material para desperdicio y errores de corte

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
